# Spire Group Inc.

Spire Group Inc. is a clinical SaaS and AI healthcare platform development firm based in Las Vegas, Nevada.

## What We Build

We design, develop, and deploy AI-powered clinical and healthcare SaaS platforms. Our specialization is multi-stakeholder clinical systems requiring HIPAA-aware architecture, AI integration, provider credentialing, mobile-first delivery, and autonomous agent systems.

## Use Case

Aesthetics To Go (aestheticstogo.com) is our primary use case — a fully autonomous AI-powered clinical operating system connecting patients with vetted independent aesthetic providers who travel directly to patients. The platform includes smart scheduling, real-time route optimization, AI procedure simulation, treatment recommendations, a medical AI assistant, provider credentialing, inventory control, and a 7-agent autonomous marketing system.

## Technology

React Native · .NET · Python/Flask · AWS (HIPAA-architecture) · Claude API · PostgreSQL · MongoDB · Node.js · Cloudflare Workers · MediaPipe/OpenCV · GitHub Pages

## IP Filings (ATG platform — filed under Infotech Inc.)

Provisional Patent (USPTO) · Trademark Classes 44 & 9 (USPTO) · Copyright Deposits (U.S. Copyright Office)

## Contact
